0.q: Antisense expression of AmCMO mRNA suppressed the salt-induced accumulation of AmCMO and betaine, but increased the level of choline ~2–3-fold. This indicates that betaine synthesis is highly regulated by AmCMO expression.

1.q: a novel Rieske-type iron–sulphur enzyme, choline monooxygenase (CMO), catalyses this step ... the first step of glycine betaine synthesis in plants

2.q: the overexpression of AtrNHX8 in A. thaliana improved salt tolerance... NHXs regulate pH and Na+ homeostasis in the cell to reduce the toxic concentration of Na+ in the cytosol.
